DOCUMENT.source-infobase-title: The Rules of the City of New York

RECORD.PARA: (a)Whenever a respondent is found in violation of any of the following provisions of the New York City Administrative Code or the Rules of the City of New York or the New York Code of Rules and Regulations, any civil penalties recommended by a hearing officer, pursuant to 48 RCNY § 6-17(a) in accordance with Section 1049-a(d)(1)(d) of the Charter and/or any civil penalties imposed for admissions of violations, pursuant to 48 RCNY § 6-09(a) or late admissions, pursuant to 48 RCNY § 3-17 will be imposed, pursuant to the penalty schedule set forth below. [ALP S-033]
(b)If a stipulation is offered and accepted at or before a hearing, the stipulation penalty will be imposed. [ALP S-033]
(c)Unless otherwise indicated, all citations are to 15 RCNY Chapter 1. [ALP S-033]
(d)A second offense is a violation by the same respondent within two years, for an infraction of the same section of the rules. [ALP S-033]
(e)The default penalty for all charges in this Penalty Schedule shall be twice the penalty set forth in subsection (a) of 15 RCNY § 53-02. [ALP S-033]
(a) Penalty Table for Violations of Title 15 of the Rules of the City of New York. [ALP S-041]

COL.PARA: Failure of asbestos handler supervisor to comply with all provisions of Asbestos Rules
Knowingly made a false statement or submitted a false document to DEP or any individual or city agency [ALP S-080]
Did not permit DEP inspection of asbestos project/abatement activities
Interfered with or obstructed DEP personnel
Failed to generate an approved variance (v2 Form) by entering start date in ARTS [ALP S-112
Failed to place ACP-7 in postponed status in ARTS until variance application approved [ALP S-112]
Conducted building survey and hazard assessment without DEP certification
Failed to sign/affix valid investigators seal to plan or report as required
Failed to comply with reporting and filing requirements
Failed to calculate project size and scope as required
Failed to submit required certification to Buildings Dept
Failed to file required Asbestos Assessment Report (ACP-5) with Buildings Dept
Failed to file required Asbestos Assessment Report (ACP-5) with Buildings Dept
Failed to notify DEP in writing of any change on project notification
Failed to obtain asbestos abatement permit when required
Failed to comply with work place safety plan
Failed to maintain/provide record of final inspection
Failed to terminate asbestos abatement permit w/in 1 yr. of issuance
Failed to maintain required insurance during work permitted work
Commenced permitted work prior to permit issuance
Failed to submit letter to ATRU regarding additional asbestos on projects with WPSP
Failed to immediately notify DEP of emergency project as required
Failed to notify DEP by ARTS E-File of emergency project within 48 hours [ALP S-080]
Failed to maintain permanent records of asbestos surveys as required
Failed to compile complete records of asbestos survey as required
Failed to properly record work by non-certified individual as required
Failed to maintain records of asbestos surveys for 30 years
Failed to make asbestos survey records available for inspection by DEP
Failed to properly store records or report damage/loss/destruction of records
Failed to respond to DEP request for production of records [ALP S-080]
Failed to properly maintain project record
Failed to properly maintain project summary
Failed to make project record or project summary available for inspection in a timely manner
Failed to maintain air monitor project summary
Failed to store records to minimize possibility of water damage [ALP S-112]
Performed abatement activities without air monitoring[ALP S-112]
Failed to retain independent third party air monitor
Failed to have technician present during air sample collection
Use lab without required qualifications to perform bulk sample analysis
Used lab without required qualifications to perform air sample analysis
Employed unqualified analyst to perform air sample analysis (TEM)
Failed to perform bulk sampling as required
Failed to utilize area air sampling equipment for PCM per 60 NIOSH 7400
Failed to utilize area air sampling equipment for TEM as required
Failed to use appropriate air sampling pump calibrated by rotometer
Failed to properly inspect and label air sampling equipment [ALP S-080]
Failed to create/maintain air sampling log
Failed to assess/identify exact locations and quantities of ACM / PACM / misc. ACM
Failed to collect bulk samples and submit for analysis
Failed to comply with sampling requirements
Sample collected by unauthorized person or outside physical presence of certified asbestos inspector [ALP S-112]
Failed to conduct air sampling in accordance with required schedule
Failed to conduct pre-abatement air sampling as required
Failed to conduct air sampling during abatement as required
Failed to conduct post-abatement air sampling as required
Failed to locate ambient samplers properly
Failed to have a chain of custody record for air samples
Failed to follow specified area sampling schedule for air monitoring
Failed to conduct air sampling for small projects as required
Failed to confirm absence of visible ACM before final air monitoring
Failed to properly place required number of samplers in work area
Failed to properly place samplers outside work area
Failed to conduct aggressive sampling according to required procedures
Area air samples did not meet schedule for post-abatement monitoring
Failed to reclean and re-sample in areas that failed clearance as required
Failed to meet release criteria for any independent work area
Failed to analyze and report PCM area air samples as required
Failed to analyze and report TEM area air samples as required
Failed to analyze and report bulk sample as required
Failed to submit bulk/air sampling results w/in 5 days of DEP request
Failed to follow proper procedures when action criteria exceeded
Failed to meet clearance and/or reoccupancy criteria
Employed uncertified workers on an asbestos project
Failed to have supervisor present during abatement activities
Allowed persons inside work place w/out proper protective clothing
Failed to perform person air monitoring as per OSHA standards
Failed to meet personal hygiene requirements at work site
Failed to have required info at work place
Failed to post asbestos warning signs at all approaches to work place
Failed to affix required warning labels to all ACM waste containers
Did not store replacement materials outside work area as required
Used replacement materials which did not comply with NYC Code and regulations
Failed to use plastic of 6-mil thickness or greater for plasticizing
Used duct tape and/or adhesive incapable of properly sealing plastic
Failed to use and/or label 6-mil bags or containers for ACM as required
Failed to enclose ACM in airtight manner with impact resistant material
Failed to use HEPA filtration as required on power tools
Failed to provide ladders/scaffolds and/or seal joints/ends of same
Failed to properly use ladders in the conduct of abatement activities [ALP S-080]
Failed to properly seal scaffold joints / ends or failed to properly use scaffolds in the conduct of abatement activities [ALP S-080]
Failed to protect walking / working surfaces from danger of tripping or stepping into holes / openings [ALP S-080]
Failed to use UL listed and approved electrical equipment
Failed to use non-carcinogenic / non-toxic chemicals
Failed to use non-combustible / fire-retardant materials
Failed to obtain DEP approval for substitute equipment/material
Failed to post notice of asbestos project as specified
Failed to post floor plan as specified
Failed to vacate work place prior to and during abatement activities
Failed to provide power from outside the work area thru GFI at source
Failed to install worker decon in required sequence
Did not limit disturbance of ACM before erecting partition as required
Failed to lockout/isolate heating/ventilation/air conditioning system
Commenced abatement prior to completion of work place preparation
Failed to properly pre-clean and remove movables and/or cover carpet
Failed to remove flammables/extinguish ignition sources
Failed to properly pre-clean and plasticize fixed objects in work area
Failed to use temporary emergency lighting when required
Failed to properly pre-clean the work area prior to plasticizing
Failed to install isolation barriers over all openings to work place
Did not segregate work area from work site with partitions as required
Failed to construct partitions to ensure unobstructed means of egress
Failed to properly seal floors and walls with 2 layers of 6-mil plastic
Failed to remove/clean ceiling-mounted objects not previously sealed
Removed contaminated ceiling tiles prior to full work area preparation
Failed to lock entrances not used for workers or as emergency exits
Failed to post/maintain exit signs in work area
Failed to post/maintain no smoking signs in work place
Failed to properly seal and/or cover floor drains, pits, sumps, etc.
Did not maintain, secure, lockout elevators running thru work area
Failed to provide adequate toilet facilities in vicinity of clean room
Failed to have fire extinguisher(s) in work place
Failed to provide or locate worker decon outside work area as required
Failed to construct worker decon as specified
Failed to fully line worker decon with 2 layers of opaque 6-mil plastic
Failed to secure/weatherproof outside or publicly accessible decon
Failed to provide proper prefabricated or trailer worker decon
Failed to construct and/or maintain clean room as required
Failed to install and/or maintain shower room as required
Failed to provide shower filtration system as specified
Failed to properly use or maintain equipment room
Failed to properly construct waste decon as specified
Failed to locate/install waste/worker decon where 1 exit exists
Failed to construct waste decon in accordance with 15 RCNY § 1-82(a),(c),(d),(e),(f),(g),(h)
Failed to properly construct alternative worker/waste decon for small project
Failed to properly utilize alternative worker/waste decon for small project
Failed to utilize negative pressure ventilation equipment
Failed to use manometer to document pressure differential
Failed to use negative pressure ventilation equipment 24 hrs/day
Did not maintain static negative air pressure of 0.02 in. water column
Failed to turn on negative air units 1 by 1 to check barrier integrity
Failed to use dedicated power supply for negative air units
Failed to utilize/properly locate negative air cutoff switch
Failed to follow procedures for loss of power to negative Air units
Failed to provide required air changes in work area
Failed to make openings for negative air units airtight
Used negative air units not in compliance w/ANSI 9.2 standards
Operated negative air system contrary to EPA report 560/5-85 (1985)
Failed to exhaust negative air units to outside as required
Failed to properly use second negative air unit in series as required
Failed to install ducting to prevent fiber release
Failed to smoke test/inspect/monitor ducts to ensure no fiber release
Workers / visitors failed to enter work area through worker decontamination system [ALP S-080]
Failed to submit / maintain log [ALP S-080]
Failed to ensure all individuals are familiar with workplace entry requirements prior to entry [ALP S-080]
Failed to follow workplace entry requirements [ALP S-080]
Failed to ensure that proper work area exit procedures are followed
Failed to follow procedures for entry into confined space [ALP S-080]
Permitted storage of ACM/carts in clean room when used as holding area
Improperly removed waste while workers used combined decon system
Improperly worker transit during waste transfer in combined decon
Did not clean ACM container/equipment properly before transfer into decon
Failed to properly bag/package containerized ACM waste and equipment
Improper washroom transit of workers prior to end of waste removal
Failed to properly remove waste and equipment from airlock to holding area
Failed to use/clean waste storage carts as required
Failed to secure exit from waste decontamination system
Failed to store waste storage carts in worksite holding area
Failed to inspect plastic barriers and partitions twice per shift
Failed to smoke test plastic barriers and decon twice daily
Failed to immediately repair damage or defects in decon
Failed to follow proper procedure upon fiber release or barrier damage
Failed to document specified events in daily projects log
Failed to document daily inspection to ensure exits have been checked against blockage
Failed to stop abatement activities if exits are found blocked
Performed dry removal of ACM without EPA and/or DEP approval
Failed to sufficiently wet down ACM for enhanced penetration
Failed to properly apply removal encapsulant as per federal guidelines
Failed to bag ACM directly upon detachment from substrate as specified
Failed to properly wet, wrap and secure large components of ACM
Failed to remove all visible ACM residue from abated surfaces
Failed to utilize proper material for encapsulation/repair of ACM
Failed to properly remove loose or hanging ACM before encapsulation
Failed to use acceptable pigmented encapsulant
Used encapsulant solvent or vehicle containing volatile hydrocarbon
Improperly used latex paint as encapsulant
Failed to properly field test encapsulant prior to use
Failed to apply required thickness of bridging encapsulant over ACM
Failed to use a different color for each coat of encapsulant
Failed to properly apply penetrating encapsulant to ACM
Failed to apply encapsulant with airless spray equipment as specified
Failed to properly identify encapsulated ACM
Did not properly remove loose/hanging ACM before installing enclosure
Failed to properly repair areas damaged during enclosure procedure
Failed to properly lower/remove/replace utilities service components
Failed to properly identify enclosed ACM
Failed to properly conduct glovebag procedures
Failed to bring tools/materials into work area before glovebag begins
Failed to conduct air monitoring during glovebag procedure as required
Failed to have trained/equipped workers to conduct glovebag procedures
Failed to use properly sized glovebag for diameter of insulation
Failed to wet ACM prior to stripping during glovebag procedure
Failed to properly attach glovebag to insulation
Failed to smoke test glovebag as required
Failed to properly seal adjacent insulation during glovebag procedure
Failed to properly clean/wet surface, tools, etc. before glovebag is moved
Failed to properly seal insulation ends
Failed to properly remove tools/tool pouch from glovebag
Failed to use HEPA vacuum to evacuate glovebag or for clean up
Failed to properly collapse or seal glovebag prior to bag removal
Failed to properly double-bag and detach glovebag
Failed to properly wet/bag, dispose of waste from glovebag procedure
Failed to conduct / document visual clearance inspection [ALP S-080]
Failed to utilize glovebag within containment as specified
Conducted tent procedures on 260 linear ft/160 sq. or more of ACM
Failed to properly install and/or construct tent
Failed to install airlock at tent entrance when required
Failed to wear appropriate personal protective equipment during tent procedure
Failed to attach tent to surface to produce an airtight seal
Failed to provide/maintain proper negative air in tent
Failed to use required wet removal methods during tent procedures
Failed to place ACM removed in tent procedures in leaktight container
Failed to properly clean/encapsulate enclosed surfaces in tent
Failed to clean/encapsulate surfaces after tent failure/termination
Failed to properly clean/double bag ACM for disposal as specified
Failed to follow specified procedures for worker exit from tent
Failed to have 4 Air changes after abatement but before tent collapse
Did not collapse tent or dispose of contaminated material as specified
Failed to follow proper glovebag procedure during removal in tent
Failed to conduct / document visual clearance inspection [ALP S-080]
Failed to properly cordon off and restrict access to work area
Failed to use proper foam or liquid during removal
Failed to maintain blanket of foam or liquid during removal
Failed to keep ACRM wet during bagging process
Failed to ensure that all persons in work area wear proper boots / PPE
Carried out abatement during adverse weather conditions
Failed to properly locate worker/waste decons
Failed to remove or plasticize movable objects
Failed to properly seal openings/ensure adequate air supply
Failed to plasticize fixed objects as specified
Failed to blanket roofing material w/foam before removal
Failed to use HEPA filters on power tools used in removal
Failed to properly conduct cleanup procedures
Failed to conduct / document proper visual inspection [ALP S-080]
Failed to remove all plastic sheeting after visual inspection
Failed to conduct required air monitoring
Failed to use proper foam or liquid during removal
Failed to maintain blanket of foam or liquid during removal
Failed to keep ACM wet during bagging process
Failed to ensure that all persons in work area wear proper boots / PPE
Failed to plasticize baseboards and walls as specified
Failed to provide negative pressure ventilation
Failed to properly conduct cleanup procedures
Failed to conduct or document proper visual inspection [ALP S-080]
Failed to remove all plastic sheeting after visual inspection
Failed to conduct required air monitoring
Allowed unauthorized persons to enter restricted area
Failed to inspect and pre-clean restricted area before plasticizing
Failed to make all openings within 25 feet of affected ACM airtight
Failed to construct/maintain/use scaffolding in accordance with federal/state/city laws
Failed to properly construct/plasticize elevated platforms
Failed to properly plasticize ground-level restricted area
Failed to properly plasticize sidewalk bridges in restricted area
Failed to construct decon within restricted area
Failed to ensure that all persons in work area wear proper PPE
Performed dry removal of ACM/failed to place ACM in leak tight containers
Failed to follow proper cleanup procedure
Failed to conduct required air monitoring
Carried out abatement under adverse weather conditions
Failed to use HEPA filters on power tools used in removal
Demolished building w/ACM in place w/no danger of collapse
Failed to submit copy of condemnation letter, declaration, order, or scope of work to DEP [ALP S-080]
Failed to perform demolition as per Administrative Code § 28-215 / 56 NYCRR § 11.5
Failed to bag/wrap/containerize waste immediately upon removal
Failed to properly clean waste decon on completion of waste removal
Failed to properly clean worker decon when required
Failed to stop work and dispose of excess water in work area
Failed to HEPA vacuum all surfaces after removal of all visible ACM
Failed to wet clean all surfaces in work area (first cleaning)
Failed to apply lockdown encapsulant as specified
Failed to vacate area for 12 hrs after 1st cleaning
Failed to remove 1st layer of surface barriers
Failed to follow required procedures for third cleaning
Failed to remove 2nd layer of surface barriers
Failed to verify absence of ACM prior to clearance air monitoring
Failed to remove containerized waste from work areas as required
Failed to properly decontaminate or dispose of tools, equipment, etc.
Removed isolation barriers before successful clearance air monitoring
Failed to submit project monitor's report within 21 days of project completion
Failed to post notice of asbestos project as required before abatement
Failed to evacuate all occupants prior to abatement activities
Failed to lock out electrical power and/or provide outside power as required
Failed to install worker waste decon in required sequence
Failed to lock out HVAC and/or install isolation barriers at ducts
Commenced abatement prior to completion of work place preparation
Used methods that raise dust during work area preparation
Failed to properly preclean and/or remove movable objects from work area
Failed to install required isolation barriers as specified
Failed to properly cover / seal cinderblock / porous construction material
Failed to make flooring in work area watertight
Disturbed contaminated ceiling tiles prior to full work area prep
Failed to establish and maintain required means of egress
Failed to lock entrances to work area against unauthorized entry
Failed to maintain/secure/lock-out elevators running thru work area
Failed to provide adequate external toilet facilities near clean room
Performed concurrent abatement & demolition or story removal
Failed to bag/wrap/containerize waste immediately upon removal
Failed to properly clean waste decon on completion of waste removal
Failed to clean worker decon after shift/meal break as specified
Failed to stop work and dispose of excess water in work area
Failed to properly remove/containerize visible accumulations of ACM
Failed to remove containerized waste from work area as required
Failed to properly wet-clean / HEPA vac surfaces in work area
Failed to properly clean and/or encapsulate plastic on porous material
Failed to properly encapsulate surfaces in work area
Failed to remove and decontaminate all tools and equipment as required
Remove isolation barriers before final air clearance
Failed to submit project monitor's report within 21 days of project completion

RECORD.PARA: (b) Penalty Table for Violations of New York State Industrial Code. [ALP S-041]

COL.PARA: Violation of New York State Industrial Code Rule 56 - level 1
Violation of New York State Industrial Code Rule 56 - level 2
Violation of New York State Industrial Code Rule 56 - level 3

RECORD.PARA: (c) Penalty Table for Violations of New York City Administrative Code. [ALP S-041]

COL.PARA: Resumed work in violation of stop-work order [ALP S-080]
Violated Master Environmental Remediation Technician Law

RECORD.PARA: (Added City Record 12/7/2018, eff. 1/6/2019; amended City Record 8/21/2019, eff. 9/20/2019; amended City Record 11/25/2022, eff. 12/25/2022; amended City Record 7/2/2025, eff. 8/1/2025) [ALP S-112]
